lengthened_position_considerations: Include at least one pain-free exercise that challenges the muscle at a relatively long length when practical; evidence is muscle-specific and does not justify painful ROM.
indirect_set_contribution: Pressing contributes 1.0; close-grip or overhead pressing usually 0-0.5
recovery_considerations: Adjust from the starting range using standardized performance, soreness that affects training, joint tolerance, sleep, and session quality rather than soreness alone.
cutting_adjustment: Begin by retaining recent productive volume; reduce low-value sets 10-30% only if recovery or performance repeatedly deteriorates.
recomp_adjustment: Use maintenance-to-moderate productive volume and prioritize repeatable progression.
maintenance_adjustment: Operational estimate: approximately 25-50% of recent productive volume with retained effort/load exposure.
bulking_adjustment: Add sets only after calories, technique, exercise selection, and recovery are adequate and performance has plateaued.
notes: Set numbers are conservative operational starting ranges inferred from general dose-response evidence, not validated muscle-specific biological thresholds. Count hard working sets near the target RIR; exclude warm-ups.
